title: mls.rs: process_for_group sender_pub_id extracted before checking message type
description: mls.rs:262-263: sender_pub_id is extracted via processed.credential().serialized_content() before matching on processed.into_content(). For StagedCommitMessage and ProposalMessage the sender_pub_id is computed and then discarded (not returned). This is harmless but the extraction is load-bearing only for ApplicationMessage. If a future openmls version makes credential() behave differently for commit senders (e.g., returning the committer's cred), the extraction here would be used for the wrong purpose. Add a comment clarifying that sender_pub_id is only returned for ApplicationMessage.
